title: Operations Analyst
description: Johnson & Johnson is one of the world's most trusted healthcare companies, serving 1.3 billion people across pharmaceutical, medical device, and consumer health. We're seeking talented professionals to support our risk management and operational excellence initiatives.
responsibilities: Analyze operational processes to identify efficiency improvements
Collect and analyze data on supply chain and manufacturing performance
Develop metrics dashboards tracking operational KPIs
Support implementation of process improvement initiatives
Create documentation of standard operating procedures
Work with cross-functional teams to solve operational problems

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Operations, Engineering, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of operations, supply chain, or business analysis experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
